title: Skills
description: The agent sees a cheap skill catalog first, then loads full SKILL.md content only when needed.

steps.content: build_system: skills available: agent-builder, code-review, mcp-builder, pdf
steps.annotation: Startup scans the skills directory and injects short descriptions into the system prompt.

steps.content: Review this change like a code reviewer.
steps.annotation: The user asks for specialized behavior.
The model chooses to load the full skill on demand.

steps.content:
# Code Review Skill
Focus on bugs, regressions, and missing tests...
steps.annotation: Full skill text is injected as a tool result, not permanently in the system prompt.

steps.content: I'll review the diff for behavioral risks first, then note test gaps.
steps.annotation: The loaded skill guides the next response.
